description: Recto: Letter sent to al-Mahalla concerning various business matters and dealing with the sale of sugar, chewing gum (mastaka) and rice. Dated 1165. Mentions a certain Rashīd b. Mufaḍḍal, the ḍāmin of Sharbīn, in the Gharbiyya province of the delta. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 605-606, and Goitein's index cards). Verso: Recipes in Arabic script. (Information from CUDL).
